scope.summary: Extracts the lane registry debug lock-rank runtime seam from lane.rs into a private lane/runtime_lock.rs module without changing lane behavior or public API.
out_of_scope: scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh ratchet update; that shared script remained dirty/reserved under pane 5 and is recorded as a follow-up boundary rather than claimed here.
No workspace-wide cargo test result is claimed for this close.

limitations: The max-file-size ratchet was not lowered in scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh in this commit because the operator instructed this pane to exclude that dirty shared file and record the ratchet update as pane 5 follow-up work.

The close proof is scoped to the lane-runtime split. A broader CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core run was not used as close proof in this shared checkout because unrelated doctor/subscriptions tests failed earlier while lane::tests passed.
follow_ups: Pane 5 owns lowering the C6 file-size ratchet for crates/oraclemcp-core/src/lane.rs in scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh once the shared script is no longer dirty/reserved.
